english: Salutations to Savitr, the single eye of the world, the cause of the world's creation, sustenance and dissolution
roman: Namah savitre jagad eka chakshuse jagat prasuti sthiti nasa hetave

english: To the one who is the three Vedas, who sustains the three gunas, who is Brahma, Narayana and Shankara in one

hindi: अष्टाश्ववाहनसहस्रकिरणप्रभेन्द्र, विद्राविणे वरद भास्कराय ते नमः।
english: O Lord of eight horses, of thousand rays, the supreme light, who drives away all, boon-giving Bhaskara — salutations
roman: Ashta ashva vahana sahasra kirana prabh endra vidravine varada Bhaskaraya te namah

english: I take refuge in the eastern mountain (the rising sun) who is capable of destroying the dense darkness born in fear
roman: Bhiti pradam tamasi jata mahad dhakaram hantum samartha udaya achalam ashrayami

hindi: ब्रह्मा मुरारिस्त्रिपुरान्तकारी, भानुः शशी भूमिसुतो बुधश्च।
english: Brahma, Murari, the destroyer of Tripura, the Sun, Moon, son of Earth (Mars), Mercury
roman: Brahma Muraris Tripurantakari Bhanuh shashi bhumi suto Budhashcha

hindi: गुरुश्च शुक्रः शनिराहुकेतवः, सर्वे ग्रहाः शान्तिकरा भवन्तु॥
english: Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu and Ketu — may all planets bring peace
roman: Gurushcha Shukrah Shani Rahu ketavah sarve grahah shanti kara bhavantu

hindi: सूर्यमण्डलाष्टकमिदं पठेद् यो, रोगाद् विमुच्येत स सर्वदुःखात्।
english: Whoever reads this Surya Mandala Ashtakam is freed from disease and all sorrow
roman: Surya mandalaa shtakam idam pathed yo rogad vimuchyeta sa sarva duhkhat

hindi: सौरं हि मण्डलमिदं नियमेन पठ्यं, सूर्यस्य लोकमखिलं स जयेत् सुरेशम्॥
english: This solar disc stotra read regularly — one conquers all the worlds of the sun and Surya the lord of gods
roman: Souram hi mandalam idam niyamena pathyam Suryasya lokam akhilam sa jayet Suresham
